workout.finisher: Incline walk · 10 min · 3.3–3.5 mph · 6–8% incline. Skip if session hits 65 min.

exercises.name: Incline DB Bench Press
exercises.note: May 25 was 10/10/8 due to rough weekend — not a regression. Fully recovered now. Target clean 3×10. Controlled 2-sec eccentric. Left shoulder OK at 60 lb — monitor.

exercises.name: KB Single-Arm Overhead Press
exercises.note: Last done May 18. Unilateral press — core braced, don't flare the elbow. Lighter than DB press so it's safe paired with incline bench on the recovering shoulder. Alternate sides each set.

exercises.name: T-Bar Row
exercises.note: Got 12 on set 3 at 50 lb on May 25 — bump to 55 lb. Chest to pad, row to lower sternum, squeeze at the top. Don't let it turn into a shrug.

exercises.name: Face Pulls
exercises.note: Elbows high and wide. Pause at peak contraction. Non-negotiable for shoulder health — don't skip or rush.

exercises.name: Lateral Raise
exercises.note: Consistent at 15 lb. Lead with elbow, stop at shoulder height. No momentum.

exercises.name: Arms Superset: Incline DB Curl + Skull Crusher
exercises.detail: Incline DB curl 20 lb × 12 + Skull crusher 40 lb × 10 · 3 rounds
exercises.note: Incline curl last done May 21 — full stretch on the bicep, slow eccentric. Skull crusher: elbows narrow, lower just behind forehead. No flaring.

exercises.name: Core Circuit B
exercises.detail: Pallof Press 40 lb × 10/side + Ab Wheel × 10 + Bird Dog × 8/side · 2 rounds
exercises.note: Pallof press: stand tall, no hip shift when pressing out. Ab wheel from knees — only extend as far as lumbar stays neutral. Bird dog: pause 1 sec at top, do the crunch variation you like.
